title: Magnetic Cells
description: Magnetic portable storage cells for AE2 with a built-in item magnet — automatically picks up dropped items into your ME storage.
body:
# 🧲 Magnetic Cells

**Tired of items scattered on the ground?** Magnetic Cells automatically pick up items from the floor directly into your AE2 storage — so you never miss a drop again.

***

## ✨ How It Works

Craft a **Magnetic Cell**, charge it with Forge Energy, and carry it in your inventory. The built-in magnet will automatically collect nearby items and store them directly in the cell — no ME network required.

***

## 🔧 Features

*   **10 storage tiers** — from 1K up to 256M items (requires MEGA Cells for 1M+)
*   **Built-in item magnet** — automatically picks up nearby dropped items
*   **Whitelist / Blacklist filter** — control exactly what gets collected
*   **ME Drive compatible** — works as a standard AE2 storage cell in any ME Drive
*   **Multiple cells work in parallel** — carry as many as you want
*   **Forge Energy powered** — charge with any FE-compatible charger
*   **63 item types** per cell across all tiers

***

## 🔨 Crafting

**Housing** — crafting table: iron + gold + hopper + redstone block

**Cell** — shapeless: housing + AE2 storage component + ME Chest + Energy Cell _(1M+ tiers require Dense Energy Cell)_

***

## ⚙️ Compatibility

| Loader   |Version |
| -------- |------- |
| Forge    |1.20.1  |
| NeoForge |1.21.1  |

| Mod                   |Required                   |
| --------------------- |-------------------------- |
| Applied Energistics 2 |✅ Required                 |
| MEGA Cells            |⚪ Optional (1M–256M tiers) |

***

## 🐛 Issues & Feedback

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Feel free to open an issue on the project page!
